function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0001
alias: northstar_backfill_alpha
issued_on: 2025-10-28
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar early design-partner invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0001                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_alpha      |
| issued_on      | 2025-10-28                    |
| total_eur      | 610                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

next_step.current_state: Invoice note updated successfully. Per inbox workflow, now delete the processed inbox item after successful completion.
Task completed successfully: read required rulebooks and workflows, updated the invoice note with schema-compliant frontmatter from visible data, and deleted the processed inbox item.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by adding YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_28__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md from the visible invoice data, preserving the existing note body, and then deleting the handled inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read nested AGENTS.MD files when entering folders, used process-next-inbox-item workflow, applied inbox-processing-v2-update for cleanup after successful structured-record maintenance, and used migrate-records-to-frontmatter plus finance schema to keep the diff focused and preserve the original body.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked for OCR-style extraction into YAML frontmatter. The target invoice note visibly contained all required invoice schema fields and two line items, so the file was updated in place with schema-compliant frontmatter derived only from visible data in 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_28__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md, and the completed inbox item was deleted per the inbox workflows.
